sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 23

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 23:1
items.html: (to the question) The discernments of MANTZEPACH [the five final letters Mem-Nun-Tzadi-Peh-Chaf] are the MAN [Mayin Nukvin] of the Nukva herself — see Answer 71. And the discernments of the GE [Galgalta ve Eynaim] of the lower one, which cleave to the AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] of the Nukva's Gadlut, are the MAN of the embryo. And all the Zivugim [couplings] made upon the MAN of the embryo are with the incorporation of the MAN of the Nukva herself. (p. 779, beginning "And also")
